text: Fill in the blanks to test your understanding of metabolic integration and biological oxidation.
questions: The three central metabolic hubs are *Acetyl-CoA*, *pyruvate*, and the *TCA/Krebs* cycle.
During fasting, *glucagon* promotes fuel mobilisation while *insulin* is the dominant hormone of the fed state that promotes storage.
*Cyanide* poisoning blocks Complex *IV/four* of the electron transport chain, preventing oxygen from acting as the terminal electron acceptor.
The *chemiosmotic* theory proposed by Peter *Mitchell* explains how the proton gradient across the inner mitochondrial membrane drives ATP synthesis by *ATP synthase*.

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the central metabolic hubs and the electron transport chain complexes.
Good effort! Revisit the hormonal regulation of fed and fasting states.
Excellent! You have a strong grasp of metabolic integration and biological oxidation.
